subject: request for new ctpy name - sierra pacific holding co.

emails.subject: Re: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.subject_base: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.body: Re: Request for New CTPY Name Sierra Pacific Holding Co. Regarding the deal Chris Foster did on 4/6 with Sierra Pacific Holding Co. Bob Ellery, Sierra's Director of Energy Resources, and Steve Hall, one of Portland's most expeditious lawyers, have decided to execute the deal under the designation Sierra Pacific Industries, which is also named in the master agreement. We still, however, need this name added to the counterparty list in EnPower. Thank you all for your help on this, and I appreciate your future assistance in getting this deal out of the "New Counterparty" void. Kate Symes Trading Support 503-464-7486

emails.subject: Re: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.subject_base: Request for New CTPY Name - Sierra Pacific Holding Co.
emails.body: Hello Kate, Sierra Pacific Industries, Inc. has been linked to EnPower. Please advise if you're having any problems "seeing" it. Samuel Kate Symes 04/11/2001 07:38 PM
